root_text.sn35.171-173:1.1: “Yaṁ, bhikkhave, dukkhaṁ, tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn35.171-173:1.3: Cakkhu, bhikkhave, dukkhaṁ; tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo …pe…
root_text.sn35.171-173:1.5: mano dukkho; tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo.
root_text.sn35.171-173:1.6: Yaṁ, bhikkhave, dukkhaṁ tatra vo chando pahātabbo, rāgo pahātabbo, chandarāgo pahātabbo”ti.

translation_text.sn35.171-173:0.3: Desire, Etc. for the Suffering Interior
translation_text.sn35.171-173:1.1: “Mendicants, you should give up desire … greed … desire and greed for what is suffering.
